mapper.select: SELECT employee_seq AS employeeSeq, business_seq AS businessSeq, emp_name AS empName, phone, work_start_time AS workStartTime, work_end_time AS workEndTime, status FROM employees WHERE business_seq = #{businessSeq} ORDER BY employee_seq DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(employee_seq), 0) + 1 FROM employees
INSERT INTO employees (employee_seq, business_seq, emp_name, phone, work_start_time, work_end_time, status) VALUES (#{employeeSeq}, #{businessSeq}, #{empName}, #{phone}, #{workStartTime}, #{workEndTime}, 'LEAVE')
mapper.select: SELECT employee_seq AS employeeSeq, business_seq AS businessSeq, emp_name AS empName, phone, work_start_time AS workStartTime, work_end_time AS workEndTime, status FROM employees WHERE employee_seq = #{employeeSeq}

SELECT ah.attendance_seq AS attendanceSeq, ah.employee_seq AS employeeSeq, ah.work_date AS workDate, ah.actual_start_time AS actualStartTime, ah.actual_end_time AS actualEndTime, ah.attendance_status AS attendanceStatus, ah.memo, ah.created_at AS createdAt, e.emp_name AS empName FROM attendance_history ah JOIN employees e ON ah.employee_seq = e.employee_seq WHERE ah.employee_seq = #{employeeSeq} AND ah.work_date LIKE CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '%') ORDER BY ah.work_date DESC

SELECT attendance_seq AS attendanceSeq, employee_seq AS employeeSeq, work_date AS workDate, actual_start_time AS actualStartTime, actual_end_time AS actualEndTime, attendance_status AS attendanceStatus, memo, created_at AS createdAt FROM attendance_history WHERE employee_seq = #{employeeSeq} AND work_date = #{workDate}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance_history (employee_seq, work_date, actual_start_time, attendance_status, memo) VALUES (#{employeeSeq}, #{workDate}, #{actualStartTime}, #{attendanceStatus}, #{memo})
